title: calamus oxycarpus
intro: Calamus oxycarpus, also known as the lesser calamus or Acorus oxycarpus, is a type of perennial aquatic plant native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of calamus oxycarpus include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, calamus oxycarpus is often used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
